stemHtml: A pilot is using conventional navigation to fly on a non-RNAV airway defined by the fixes ASMIK-SEVAN-PEMAN, with a published course of 104°(T). To fly the centre line of the airway he/she maintains a heading of 099°(T). After having overflown waypoint SEVAN and having travelled for 20 NM, the pilot plots the position to be 3 NM off-course towards the North. Calculate the average drift after overflying waypoint SEVAN.
